title: Geas Gap
description: Mission-level record of the difference between committed scope and actual delivery. Narrative scope summaries describe the scope as actually reflected in delivery, which may drift from the original mission spec.

scope_in_summary.description: Summary of in-scope work as actually reflected in delivery.

scope_out_summary.description: Summary of out-of-scope work as actually reflected in delivery.

fully_delivered.description: Items delivered as originally committed. Empty array if none.

partially_delivered.description: Items partially delivered. Each entry should describe what was delivered vs what was not. Empty array if none.

not_delivered.description: Items that were in scope but not delivered. Note intentional cuts inline (for example, 'X (intentionally cut: time)'). Empty array if none.

unexpected_additions.description: Work added during execution that was not in the original scope. Empty array if none.
